name: Prisma AIRS Security
description: AI Runtime Security - full AIRS detection suite with audit logging, context injection, outbound blocking, and tool gating

profile_name.description: Prisma AIRS profile name from Strata Cloud Manager

reminder_mode.description: Inject security scanning reminder on agent bootstrap

audit_mode.description: Audit logging mode: deterministic (hook, always scan), probabilistic (tool, model decides), or off

context_injection_mode.description: Context injection mode: deterministic (hook, always inject), probabilistic (tool, model decides), or off

outbound_mode.description: Outbound scanning mode: deterministic (hook, always scan), probabilistic (tool, model decides), or off

tool_gating_mode.description: Tool gating mode: deterministic (hook, always gate), probabilistic (tool, model decides), or off

inbound_block_mode.description: Inbound blocking mode: deterministic (block non-allow user messages), or off

outbound_block_mode.description: Outbound blocking mode: deterministic (block non-allow assistant messages at persistence layer), or off

tool_guard_mode.description: Tool guard mode: deterministic (scan tool inputs through AIRS before execution), or off

prompt_scan_mode.description: Prompt scan mode: deterministic (scan full conversation context before prompt assembly), or off

tool_redact_mode.description: Tool redact mode: deterministic (redact PII/credentials from tool outputs before persistence), or off

llm_audit_mode.description: LLM audit mode: deterministic (scan all LLM inputs/outputs through AIRS for audit logging), or off

tool_audit_mode.description: Tool audit mode: deterministic (scan tool outputs through AIRS after execution), or off

fail_closed.description: Block messages when AIRS scan fails (default: true for security)

dlp_mask_only.description: Mask DLP violations instead of blocking (when no other violations)

high_risk_tools.description: Tools to block on any detected threat

api_key.description: Prisma AIRS API key from Strata Cloud Manager

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help: Prisma AIRS API key from Strata Cloud Manager
api_key.placeholder: Enter your PANW AI Security API key

profile_name.label: Profile Name
profile_name.help: AIRS security profile from Strata Cloud Manager

app_name.label: Application Name
app_name.help: Identifies this application in AIRS scan metadata and audit logs

inbound_block_mode.label: Inbound Blocking
inbound_block_mode.help: Block user messages unless AIRS returns allow. Hard guardrail at the persistence layer.

outbound_block_mode.label: Outbound Blocking
outbound_block_mode.help: Block assistant messages unless AIRS returns allow. Hard guardrail at the persistence layer.

outbound_mode.label: Outbound Response Scanning
outbound_mode.help: Scan outbound responses — blocks or masks content based on AIRS verdict. Supports DLP masking.

tool_guard_mode.label: Tool Input Scanning
tool_guard_mode.help: Scan tool inputs through AIRS before execution. Blocks tools when threats detected.

tool_gating_mode.label: Tool Gating (Cache-Based)
tool_gating_mode.help: Gate tool calls using cached scan results. Blocks high-risk tools when threats detected.

prompt_scan_mode.label: Full Context Scanning
prompt_scan_mode.help: Scan assembled conversation context before prompt build. Catches multi-message injection attacks.

tool_redact_mode.label: Tool Output Redaction
tool_redact_mode.help: Redact PII and credentials from tool outputs before session persistence (regex-based).

context_injection_mode.label: Context Injection
context_injection_mode.help: Inject security threat warnings into agent context on startup.

reminder_mode.label: Security Reminder
reminder_mode.help: Inject a security scanning reminder when the agent starts.

audit_mode.label: Message Audit Logging
audit_mode.help: Scan every inbound message through AIRS and log results. Populates scan cache for other hooks.

llm_audit_mode.label: LLM I/O Audit Logging
llm_audit_mode.help: Scan exact LLM prompts and responses through AIRS. Definitive audit trail at the model boundary.

tool_audit_mode.label: Tool Output Audit Logging
tool_audit_mode.help: Scan tool execution results through AIRS after completion. Complements tool input scanning.

fail_closed.label: Fail Closed
fail_closed.help: Block messages when AIRS scan fails. Recommended for production security.

dlp_mask_only.label: DLP Mask Only
dlp_mask_only.help: Mask sensitive data instead of blocking when DLP is the only violation.

high_risk_tools.label: High Risk Tools
high_risk_tools.help: Tools that are blocked on any detected threat. Add tool names to expand the list.
